title: February 2021 Technical Webinar - Moving goods between Great Britain and France
body: "February 2021 Technical Webinar - Moving goods between Great Britain and France  The agenda of the presentation was as follows:  Exchange of views on logistics and customs   Customs agents FLG (UK) GEFCO (FR) State of play Douane Border Force / HMRC Q&A   Exchange of views on SPS - 1 min scene setter   DEFRA DGAL Luke Hindlaugh Food Drink Federation Q&A   Exchange of views for the future and on planning for 1 April and 1 July and to understand views from industry on what is most urgent to cover in future engagement  Wrap up and closing remarks "
